description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult male pedestrian with a youthful appearance, standing upright with arms extended horizontally. He is dressed in a sleeveless top and knee-length shorts, both fitted and casual, suitable for warm weather or recreational activities. His footwear consists of simple slip-on shoes, and his overall build is slender and proportionate. The figure's hair is short and neatly styled, with a natural, slightly wavy texture. The skin tone is fair, and the facial features are soft and neutral, giving a friendly and approachable demeanor. The clothing and body are rendered with smooth surfaces and subtle shading, emphasizing a clean and modern look.
description: A casually dressed adult male pedestrian with a sleeveless top, knee-length shorts, slip-on shoes, and short, neatly styled hair, standing upright with arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, sleeveless top, shorts, and both arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm's extension, and the side seam of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, sleeveless top, shorts, and both arms extended horizontally.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and the side seam of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless casual top and knee-length shorts
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
